title: Going green in honour of Madiba
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Bitou Municipality has launched a green month initiative in honour of Madiba.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Bitou Municipality has launched a green month initiative in honour of Madiba."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It has urged residents to honour former president Nelson Mandela's legacy during Mandela Month by building a cleaner, greener Bitou - together.","html":"It has urged residents to honour former president Nelson Mandela's legacy during Mandela Month by building a cleaner, greener Bitou - together."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The municipality has invited all residents to participate in the launch of two recycling buy-back centres in the Kwanokuthula and New Horizons community halls."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Residents have been asked to bring their recyclable materials - paper, plastic, glass and cans - to not only help protect the environment, but to earn a little extra while doing good for their community.","html":"Residents have been asked to bring their recyclable materials - paper, plastic, glass and cans - to not only help protect the environment, but to earn a little extra while doing good for their community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Celebrating 67 Minutes for Mandela Day at Kwano-kuthula's Simunye Hall saw the official launch of the buy-back centre initiative.","html":"Celebrating 67 Minutes for Mandela Day at Kwano-kuthula's Simunye Hall saw the official launch of the buy-back centre initiative."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Meaningful engagement","html":"Meaningful engagement"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The event kicked off on Tuesday 22 July with a welcome by Speaker Mavis Busakwe, setting the tone for a day of community engagement.","html":"The event kicked off on Tuesday 22 July with a welcome by Speaker Mavis Busakwe, setting the tone for a day of community engagement."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Juan Windvogel of the waste management department led an information session on the importance of recycling and how the community can get involved. Mkhusela Makwela, manager of the buy-back centre, expressed his gratitude for the opportunity to serve the community and promote environmental awareness.","html":"Juan Windvogel of the waste management department led an information session on the importance of recycling and how the community can get involved. Mkhusela Makwela, manager of the buy-back centre, expressed his gratitude for the opportunity to serve the community and promote environmental awareness."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gain","html":"Gain"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Lisl Doherty of Polyco emphasised the importance of collaboration across sectors to make recycling work. "Waste is a resource," she said.","html":"Lisl Doherty of Polyco emphasised the importance of collaboration across sectors to make recycling work. "Waste is a resource," she said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She explained that the buy-back centre model created a gain for all parties.","html":"She explained that the buy-back centre model created a gain for all parties."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]
